resources.string: You can re-import a registry extract or small business certificate here and apply the parsed fields. Bank statement import stays separate on the statement import screen.
Android notifications are blocked, so reminders can be scheduled but will not be shown until permission is granted.
Use HH:mm local time, for example 09:00
Comma-separated days from 1 to 15, for example 10,13,15
Schedule a short test reminder to check the notification channel, text rendering, and timing on this device.
This is a test declaration reminder from Settings. Real reminders reuse the current due-period state when it is available.
This is a test payment reminder from Settings. Real reminders reuse the current due-period state when it is available.
All data stays local on the device, so backup/export is how you keep an external copy when you need one.
Importing a JSON backup replaces the current local database with the selected backup. Use it only when you want to restore the full local state.
Export one row per income entry for spreadsheets, accountant review, or personal archiving.
Export month-level declaration totals and workflow statuses when you want a compact period summary.
Create a full restoreable backup of the local app state, including taxpayer settings, entries, declarations, FX cache, and imported statement metadata.
Restore a previously exported full-app backup when moving devices or recovering after reinstall. This replaces the current local data.
Use these actions when you want a refresher, want to rate the app, or want to report a product issue.
Read short practical answers about income tracking, FX conversion, monthly declarations, reminders, backup/export, and feedback.
Reopen the lightweight product walkthrough without resetting your data.
Open the Google Play listing and leave a review if the app is helping you.

Open a public browser form for feedback or bug reports with app and device context prefilled. Anything you write can be visible to others, so do not include taxpayer IDs, PDFs, or backup/export files.
